title: Brazillian Chicken Fry
description: A classic French-inspired dish with a spicy twist, featuring crispy chicken in a zesty and flavorful fry.
instructions: 1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with spicy zesty seasoning.
2. Dredge the chicken in flour to coat.
3. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
5. Sprinkle the fry seasoning over the chicken and toss to coat.
6. Add the brazillian peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Remove the chicken from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve the chicken fry hot and enjoy!
